zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma Princess of France於1054年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內萊姆斯時，她的父親Henri I King of Franks46歲，母親Anna Iaroslavna of Kiev Reine de France31歲。她和Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1109年享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma Princess of France于1054年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內萊姆斯时，她的父亲Henri I King of Franks46岁，母亲Anna Iaroslavna of Kiev Reine de France31岁。她和Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1109年享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

nameMeanings.name: France
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: short form of   Francis   or   Frances  , or bestowed with reference to the country.

variants.name: Francis
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma Princess of France was born in 1054, in Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, her father, Henri I King of Franks, was 46 and her mother, Anna Iaroslavna of Kiev Reine de France, was 31. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI. She died in 1109, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma Princess of France est née en 1054, à Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Henri I King of Franks, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Anna Iaroslavna of Kiev Reine de France, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI. Elle est décédée en 1109, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma Princess of France 1054 in Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henri I King of Franks 46 und ihre Mutter Anna Iaroslavna of Kiev Reine de France 31. Sie hatte mit Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1109 im Alter von 55 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma Princess of France è nata il nel 1054 nel Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, sua padre, Henri I King of Franks, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Anna Iaroslavna of Kiev Reine de France, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI. Morì nel 1109, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma Princess of Franceが1054年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンレイムズで生まれた時，父Henri I King of Franksは46歳，母Anna Iaroslavna of Kiev Reine de Franceは31歳であった。彼女はGauthier Ier DE DOUAIとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1109年に55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma Princess of France(이)가 1054년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 레임스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henri I King of Franks(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Iaroslavna of Kiev Reine de France(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1109년 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma Princess of France nasceu em 1054, em Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Henri I King of Franks, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Anna Iaroslavna of Kiev Reine de France, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI. Ela faleceu em 1109, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma Princess of France родилась в 1054 г. в местности римс, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция, её отцу по имени Henri I King of Franks было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Iaroslavna of Kiev Reine de France, 31. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI. Она умерла в 1109 г. в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma Princess of France nació en 1054, en Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Henri I King of Franks, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Anna Iaroslavna of Kiev Reine de France, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI. Murió en 1109, a la edad de 55 años.
